# youtrack_global_settings (Resource)

YouTrack global settings resource. This resource manages the global settings in YouTrack, specifically the license configuration.

## Example Usage

```terraform
resource "youtrack_global_settings" "license" {
  license = "your-license-key-here"
}
```

<!-- schema generated by tfplugindocs -->
## Schema

### Optional

- `license` (String, Sensitive) The license key for the YouTrack instance. Can be null if no license is configured.

### Read-Only

- `id` (String) The ID of the global settings configuration.
- `last_updated` (String) Timestamp of the last update

## Import

Import is supported using the following syntax:

The [`terraform import` command](https://developer.hashicorp.com/terraform/cli/commands/import) can be used, for example:

```shell
# Global settings is a singleton resource.
# You can use any value for the import ID (it will be ignored).
# The resource will fetch the current global settings.
terraform import youtrack_global_settings.license global-settings
```
